subcodes.first_line: O articulate handmaid of God! The essence of all praise, glorification and commendation of this servant is to express servitude at the Sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الناطقه جوهر محامد و نعوت و ستایش این عبد بیان عبودیت باستان مقدس
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
